hero.title: Backend and AI systems engineer turning production constraints into clean delivery.
hero.subtitle: .NET backend, platform engineering, and applied AI
hero.lead: I build production-grade APIs, delivery pipelines, and AI-enabled workflows with a strong bias toward reliability, clarity, and measurable business outcomes.

hero.portraitCaption: Building resilient backend and AI delivery systems in production.
recruiterSnapshot: 5+ years in software delivery and backend engineering
Best fit: backend, platform, and applied AI systems roles
Core stack: .NET / C#, SQL Server, Azure, Kubernetes, CI/CD

about.summary: Production-minded engineering with infrastructure awareness, system design discipline, and practical AI execution.
about.text:
I build backend and AI systems with a strong production mindset, focusing on **reliability, clarity, and measurable outcomes**.

In my current work, I lead and structure **agentic AI development processes**, using **spec-driven development** to align requirements, implementation, and validation. I also design reusable internal tooling for **Claude Code usage**, create shared AI **skills and workflows**, and mentor engineers on practical AI delivery patterns.

I am building a production-oriented **AI Agent for bill parsing** and integrating **AI-assisted code review** into CI/CD with human validation gates. My goal is to improve engineering speed and quality without sacrificing ownership or standards.

I also operate in DevOps-related domains, including **Kubernetes**, **Azure DevOps**, and **Google Cloud**, connecting application delivery with infrastructure reliability.

Core stack: **.NET / C#**, **PostgreSQL and SQL Server**, **Azure and Google Cloud**, CI/CD automation, and AI API integrations (including personal projects with Gemini image transformation).

contact.summary: The strongest fit is backend, platform, or AI-systems work where delivery quality matters.
contact.title: Available for recruiter and hiring-manager conversations.
contact.body: If you are hiring for backend engineering, platform work, or applied AI systems, LinkedIn is the fastest way to reach me. I reply with context, not buzzwords.

experiences.description:
Shipped invoice collection and telemetry services exposing 11k+ invoices/month through Azure API Management.
- Owned PRs, code reviews, QA, and deployment for release-ready delivery.
- Applied DDD, Clean Architecture, and SOLID in production APIs and telemetry enrichment.

Built APIs, databases, and support services for product and out-of-roadmap requests.
- Turned ad hoc work into stable delivery with clear handoffs.
- Kept internal teams unblocked while the roadmap kept moving.

Built React and AngularJS features for a marketing automation SaaS platform.
- Implemented contact segmentation and automation flows with Python and Flask.
- Contributed across frontend, API, and data layers.

Supported high-security telephony systems using UNIX and PostgreSQL.
- Automated repetitive operations with shell scripts.
- Translated complex incidents for non-technical clients and minimized downtime.

projectsList.title: AI Agent for Bill Parsing
projectsList.description: Production-oriented bill parsing agent designed for structured extraction, validation, and exception routing in an operation with 11k+ invoices per month and real reliability constraints.

projectsList.title: Internal Claude Code Enablement
projectsList.description: Built internal Claude Code onboarding with reusable skills, prompt scaffolds, and delivery guardrails so engineers could adopt agentic workflows faster without lowering standards.

projectsList.title: AI Code Review in CI/CD
projectsList.description: Integrated AI review into CI/CD to summarize diffs, surface risky changes earlier, and preserve human approval as the final gate for release decisions.

projectsList.title: Personal AI API Integrations
projectsList.description: Personal API experiments with Gemini and other tools, focused on image transformation workflows, multimodal prototyping, and fast validation of new AI capabilities.

certificationsSummary: Relevant certifications that reinforce applied cloud and AI learning, while experience and shipped work remain the main proof.
